description: Document relating to the activities of the Talmud Tora school (Scuole Gratuite Israelitiche), and stamped with the school's seal. Perhaps a receipt for a donation by Se. Mordukh? Signed by [...] Raṣon. The number 1887 appears in the text, presumably the Gregorian year.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
